problem id: 88fff090
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  11000010 -> 00001000
  01011010 -> 00100001
  10100110 -> 00001010
  00010100 -> 01000000
  11110010 -> 00001011
  00010010 -> 00000000
  11011111 -> 01111101
  00100110 -> 00000000
  01110011 -> 00000101
  11100110 -> 00001010

query: 10011110
predicted answer: 01101000
